LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EMBARCADERO ADVISORS INCORPORATED'S RE-NOTICED MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION. A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. THE DISCOVERY REQUESTS ARE REASONABLY RELATED TO THE TRANSACTIONS AT ISSUE AND CALCULATED TO LEAD TO THE DISCOVERY OF ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE. THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. IT IS ORDERED THAT THE OBJECTIONS TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF EMBARCADERO ADVISORS INCORPORATED NUMBERED 27-30 AND 35 EXCEPT FOR ATTORNEY-CLIENT PRIVILEGE AND ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT AND OBJECTIONS BE OVERRULED AND THAT FURTHER RESPONSES BE SERVED BY MARCH 25, 2013. A PRIVILEGE LOG AS TO COMMUNICATIONS CLAIMED TO BE PRIVILEGED MUST BE PROVIDED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-26-2013 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Continued To Jan-27-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Embarcadero Advisors Incorporated'S Re-Noticed Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN BROWN, TEL. NO. 409-8600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEVEN J. GARRETT OF O'CONNOR AND ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 693-9960 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Embarcadero Advisors Incorporated's Re-Noticed Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production is Granted. The discovery requests are reasonably related to the transactions at issue and calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. The request for attorney fees and costs is denied. It is ordered that the objections to Request for Production of Embarcadero Advisors Incorporated numbered 27-30 and 35 except for attorney-client privilege and attorney work product and objections be overruled and that further responses be served by March 25, 2013. A privilege log as to communications claimed to be privileged must be provided. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; nOT REPORTED. = (302/MJM)

Re-Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF EMBARCADERO ADVISORS INCORPORATED'S Re-Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production IS Continued on the court's own motion to March 1, 2013, a date agreed to by the parties. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

John C. Brown, Esq. of Cornerstone Law Group, Tel. 415.409.8600, for plaintiff and moving party;
Steven J. Garrett, Esq. of O'Connor & Associates, Tel. 415.693.9960, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The parties did not stipulate to the Pro Tem Judge. The matter was argued. Pro Tem Judge to prepare Report and Recommendation. PLAINTIFF EMBARCADERO ADVISORS INCORPORATED'S Re-Noticed Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production is continued to February 26 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem: James Watson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
